title: Regional Load-Balancing Protocol
requirements: Geofenced traffic routing: Direct users to the nearest regional shard replica.
Failover-Equilibrium: Automatically redirect traffic on regional shard failure.
Weighted-Sovereignty: Prefer Egypt-soil nodes for MENA-EG traffic.
Compliance: Adherence to Law 151 data residency during cross-shard failover.

logic.detection: Continuous health-check monitoring of regional shard ingress.
logic.routing: Dynamic update of GSLB (Global Server Load Balancing) nodes.
logic.failover: Enforce 'Regional-Lockdown' (P-08) during failover to prevent PII leakage.

compliance.security: mTLS enforcement between balancer and shard replicas.
compliance.auditing: Log all routing decisions and failover events in the Factory-Ledger.
